comment: Routing taxonomy: questions are sorted into these buckets by embedding similarity to each bucket's 'anchor' description before any clustering. 'category' is the fixed merge map - the broad dashboard category each bucket collapses into. Edit freely; bump 'version' when you do.

buckets.name: Antivirus & File Scanning
buckets.anchor: Antivirus scanning of transferred files: virus detection, malware scanning, quarantine folders and quarantined files, scan failures, infected file handling, scan notifications and alerts on detection, ICAP scanner integration

buckets.name: Metering & Licensing
buckets.anchor: Metering and licensing: the metering agent, metering server configuration, transaction counting and usage metering, license keys, licensing terms, billing of transactions

buckets.name: Scheduling & Performance
buckets.anchor: Scheduling and performance: scheduled actions and schedulers, cron expressions, thread pools and thread counts, performance tuning, vertical and horizontal scaling, CPU cores, cluster nodes, load and throughput

buckets.name: File Handling
buckets.anchor: File handling operations: find task, move, copy, merge and rename files, control files, post-processing actions, file triggers, folder monitoring, file name patterns, archiving files

buckets.name: Connectivity & Authentication
buckets.anchor: Connectivity and authentication: SFTP, FTPS and HTTPS connections, Azure Blob storage containers, AWS S3, OAuth and access tokens, container-level tokens, certificates and certificate stores, key vaults, credentials, proxies and firewalls

buckets.name: Monitoring & Alerting
buckets.anchor: Monitoring and alerting: end-to-end monitoring, e2e monitoring tools, alert and notification configuration, email notifications, dashboards, health checks, monitoring single applications, alerting on errors

buckets.name: Errors, Logs & Bugs
buckets.anchor: Errors and troubleshooting: exceptions and stack traces, NullPointerException, debug and error logs, log files, failed transfers, custom error codes, exit statuses, unexpected behavior, bug reports

buckets.name: Install, Upgrade & Admin
buckets.anchor: Installation and administration: installing and upgrading versions, container images, pre-installed components, user management, roles and permissions, admin UI configuration and UI settings, REST API administration and automation
